ham: Dear patient, this is a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled for 10:30 AM tomorrow at City Hospital. Please arrive 10 minutes early. Reply YES to confirm. Thank you.
spam: URGENT: Your courier (ID 4X7Y3) was scheduled for delivery today but was not delivered. Please visit <URL> to reschedule or claim within 24 hours, otherwise it will be returned to sender. Reply STOP to opt‑out.
